meaning: n.大纲,轮廓,略图,外形,要点,概要vt.描画轮廓,略述
examples: She drew the figures in outline.
Trees soften the outline of the house.
At last we could see the dim outline of an island.
Willie Walsh, the head of BA, has written in the Times today to outline the carrier's position.
Rather, it modeled generic tax cuts that follow the outline of what his budget describes.
